limitations: Exact-ref GitHub connector reads were used, but the isolated execution environment could not clone github.com because outbound DNS was unavailable; tests and builds were not executed locally.

No persisted exact-HEAD evidence demonstrates all three real Web Pro journeys, a fresh post-fix independent audit, pristine release state, or v1.8.1 tag binding.
